The '''KT6 Heavy Blaster Cannon''' was created by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] and equipped on [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttles]]. Control of the weapons was split between two of the assault shuttle's three gunners, and they were sometimes used during boarding actions to cripple the target spacecraft.<ref name="ISB" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
